title: Shield Recolor
body:
## Changes the shield texture.
- The resource pack only works on versions 1.21.9 and higher.
- You can adjust the texture yourself. Shield textures directory: /assets/minecraft/textures/entity/.

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e26140247897f24289a71bf447a85705ae3bb07.png)
